name: AIR-DROW Layout & Legacy Runtime Hardening Edition
delivery: The source package is ready for npm ci and npm run vercel:build. The Termux installer preserves the existing local Kurdish UI font while replacing the rest of the project transactionally.
releaseName: AIR-DROW Layout & Legacy Runtime Hardening Edition
summary: Wider Kurdish About cards, deterministic settings entry and WebKit-safe runtime helpers without changing the physical-action safety contract.
releaseChecks: Trusted physical controls are required before any file-producing or destructive action can run.
Raster exports render stored source strokes before any live-canvas snapshot fallback.
The hand guide is live-camera-only and is never part of exported artwork.
Older WebKit can fall back when structuredClone() or Array.prototype.at() are unavailable.
The PWA page, manifest, source module graph, worker cache namespace and release descriptor use the same v8.3.2 build identity.
